text_excerpt: Contact - James Naish MP for Rushcliffe Skip to content Help & Advice My Work In The Media About Me Contact Home Find Help Social Services & Benefits Education Healthcare Housing Immigration and Visas Other Matters My Work In the media About Contact Home Find Help Social Services & Benefits Education Healthcare Housing Immigration and Visas Other Matters My Work In the media About Contact Contact Scroll to see how I can help Please note that due to strict Parliamentary protocol, I am only able to make enquiries on behalf of my own constituents. To check if you live in my constituency, check your MP here Here’s how I can help you: As your MP I can help with a variety of issues and concerns. First steps Keeping the issue private, I can write to the relevant department, official, or Minister or make a personal appointment to discuss the issue. This can often go a long way to providing a solution to your issue. Making the issue public I can also help to make the issue public by raising it in the House of Commons, where it will be officially recorded, and could potentially come to the attention of the press and public. Outside Parliament Outside Parliament, you can request that I speak at an event concerning your issue, pledge my support to a campaign or write to the local media on your behalf. Friday 24th April Time 2-5pm Location Tollerton Next surgery REQUEST an appointment I hold weekly advice surgeries. They are by appointment only. To make an appointment please send an email using the contact form. Fill in this form to get in touch Description Organiser Location Postcode Mobile Email Address I would like to sign up to James' newsletter. I understand I can opt out at any time. See Privacy Policy for more details. Submit form CONTACT MY OFFICE My team in Rushcliffe can often help without you having to attend an advice surgery. Contact my constituency office via one of the ways listed below stating where you live and a member of the team will get in touch. Rushcliffe Constituency Office Email address [email protected] Address A location in West Bridgford (Send mail to James Naish MP, House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA) Opening hours Monday to Friday 9am- 5pm Phone Number 0115 646 6404 Westminster Office Email address [email protected] Address James Naish MP, House of Commons, London SW1A 0AA Opening hours Monday to Friday 9am- 5pm Phone Number 0115 646 6404 Meetings & Events I welcome opportunities to meet with local groups, organisations and businesses throughout Rushcliffe . Please consider inviting me to your meeting or event, but understand that it will not always be possible, due to my parliamentary and other commitments.
